sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n102846" key="tekmarto/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">τεκμαρ-τός</orth>, <pb n="1768" TEIform="pb"/> <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ή</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n102846.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">possible to be determined</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">πρὸς εἶδος . . οὐδὲν προσιδόντι τεκμαρτόν</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0434.tlg001:260" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Cratin.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">260</biblScope> </bibl> </cit> (hex.).</sense> </entryFree>
